It reduces the work to passive metric review and refresh, while the source request is an exception-follow-up decision dashboard for today's operations work.","next_action":"Rebuild the workflow around deciding which fulfillment exception needs follow-up today: list actionable exceptions, define what each exception means, show accountable owner, show freshness or last-updated status, and attach the next follow-up action.
